findings: Module title, order, objectives, and assignment all align with the published Algebra I course JSON for Module 11.
No AP, College Board, Common App, CEEB, accreditation, NCAA, or college-admissions claims appear in the lesson narration, slides, or metadata.
No sourced or generated bitmap images are used; coordinate planes, line plots, intersection markers, substitution chains, and elimination ladders are all drawn deterministically in build_slides.py.
No URLs are read aloud in the narration; resources are referenced by name (OpenStax, Khan Academy).
Title and description guidance remains conservative and GIIS-owned; foundation-only framing matches the playbook.
